# Stashpad

> Stashpad is a local, terminal-based developer reference manager. Install with `pip install stashpad`; run as `stash`. Save shell commands, code snippets, URLs, and notes in a searchable JSON vault at `~/.config/stash/vault.json`.

Stashpad is CLI-only (Python 3.8–3.12, Typer + Pydantic). There is no server or cloud sync — data stays on disk in one file per vault.

- **PyPI package:** `stashpad`
- **CLI command:** `stash`
- **Python module:** `stash_cli`
- **Default vault:** `~/.config/stash/vault.json` (override with `STASH_DATA_DIR`, `--config-dir`, or `stash init [data_dir]`)
- **Scripting:** pass `--json` before subcommands for machine-readable output
- **Repository:** https://github.com/Vicba/stash-cli

Typical workflow:

```bash
pip install stashpad
stash init --name my-vault
stash entry add "Docker prune" "docker system prune -af" --tag devops
stash entry list --tag devops
stash search "prune"
stash export json ./backup.json
stash import --from-file ./backup.json
```

## Documentation

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/README.md): Project overview, architecture, and quick start
- [Getting started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/docs/getting-started.md): Install, init vault, first entries, backup
- [CLI reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/docs/cli-reference.md): All commands, flags, and aliases
- [Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/docs/configuration.md): `STASH_*` env vars and vault paths
- [Data model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/docs/data-model.md): `vault.json` schema, entries, tags, import/export formats

## Examples

- [Examples index](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/examples/README.md): Runnable demo scripts and sample data
- [Daily workflow recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/examples/recipes/daily-workflow.md): Common day-to-day `stash` usage
- [Backup and restore recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/examples/recipes/backup-and-restore.md): Export/import workflow
- [Sample entries JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/examples/data/sample-entries.json): Example import payload

## Optional

- [Development guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/docs/development.md): Tests, lint, project layout, contributing
- [Changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history
- [pyproject.toml](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vicba/stash-cli/main/pyproject.toml): Package metadata, dependencies, and entry points
